title: . Continuation of insurance policies and indemnity bonds. All workmen’s compensation insurance
content:
. Continuation of insurance policies and indemnity bonds. All workmen’s compensation insurance 
policies and indemnity bonds for self-insured employers existing upon the effectivity of this Code shall remain 
in force and effect until the expiration dates of such policies or the lapse of the period of such bonds, as the 
case may be, but in no case beyond December 31, 1974. Claims may be filed against the insurance carriers 
and/or self-insured employers for causes of action which accrued during the existence of said policies or 
authority to self-insure.
